## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content inventory strategies and workflow integration for Atlas, focusing on Marcel's expertise as a power user.](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas aims to replace tools like SEMrush and Airtable for content inventory management](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [MVP focus: Assume complex setup is handled; prioritize core experience and monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Content tagging: Human-configured taxonomy, AI-assisted classification for scale](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Opportunity scoring: Combine relevance, volume, and difficulty for prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

## Topics

### Current Workflow and Tool Integration

  - [Replacing SEMrush and Airtable functionalities within Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Concerns about data capacity and replicating custom Airtable functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [MVP approach: Focus on core experience, assume complex setup handled by experts](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

### Content Inventory Process

  - [Two-sided approach: sitemap analysis for evergreen content + competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Manual selection of relevant subdirectories for monitoring (MVP stage)](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Key metrics: page performance, ranking keywords, LLM queries (future enrichment)](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Tracking impact: 40 refreshes out of 1,000 URLs to measure work effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### Tagging and Categorization

  - [Custom AI columns for tagging based on categories (e.g., content themes, audience groups)](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Example taxonomies: topic clusters, group types, personas, industries](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Human-configured tag structure, AI-assisted classification for large-scale tagging (5,000+ items)](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Flexibility to add/modify tags as needed](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### Competitive Analysis and Keyword Research

  - [Keyword gap analysis between competitor domains and client domain](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Example: Interwell therapy platform - 1,000 potential assignments, 5M searches/month](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [URL-based keyword clustering for efficient assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Leveraging competitor content to identify keyword opportunities (e.g., 49 keywords for "biography therapy")](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Opportunity Scoring and Prioritization

  - [Factors: total volume, keyword difficulty, relevance, conversion value, persona fit](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Calculated score (0-100) based on relevance, volume, and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Current assignment creation already includes some scoring elements](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Goal: Combine scoring with opportunity volume and ranking difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Data Set for Development

  - [Engine recommended as the best client example for Atlas development](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Includes manually curated assignments, tagged clusters, and numerous existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Georgemaine to work with Engine data set for initial Atlas development](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Further questions to be addressed as they arise during development](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Continue refining the integration of current workflows into Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/NHAVm-5QRXV_KQUJvXD2JC9QBwwf7hb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
